description: Unidentified document in Arabic script. Fiscal accounting? Personal letter? Two different documents glued together? Reused by the same Hebrew scribe as T-S NS 111.63 and many other documents. Needs examination. See also PGPID 23556
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
